notes: Each ignored vulnerability MUST be matched by a TODO row in requirements.txt explaining why the bump is deferred and what blocks it.
All CVEs deferred by the original audit are now closed (2026-05-30). The ignored_ids list is empty — any new vulnerability surfaced by pip-audit will fail CI immediately.
Closed by langchain stack bump 2026-05-30 (this commit):
Resolver chained the whole stack: langchain 1.3.2 requires
langchain-core >= 1.4.0, which is the CVE fix. Bumped together:
Validated: bs4 4.12.3 + lxml 6.1.0 parser works ; 94 hardening tests pass.
Validated: 94 hardening tests pass on pytest 9.0.3 ; conftest unchanged ;
Validated: AES-GCM round-trip + pyjwt HS256 + asyncpg import all OK ;
Closed by C4 cycle 2 (this commit, fastapi 0.115.6→0.136.3, starlette 1.2.0):
All three vanished once starlette was pulled at 1.2.0 transitively.
Process to add a new entry:
1. Add the real vuln ID to ignored_ids (CVE/PYSEC/GHSA from the pip-audit JSON).
2. Add or update a TODO row in requirements.txt with the bump-blocker reason.
3. Document it above with package + fix version.
